Summarize the conversation so far into concise context for the QA role.

PRESERVE exactly:
- Acceptance criteria and expected user-facing behavior
- Prior diagnostics, test, and reviewer evidence already considered
- Verification steps attempted and their outcomes
- Code paths and runtime flows inspected
- Confirmed failures, gaps, and user-impacting issues
- Residual risks and unverified assumptions
- Score rationale if a score was assigned or discussed
- All identifiers (UUIDs, hashes, file paths, URLs, tokens, IPs)

OMIT:
- Verbose tool output (keep only key results)
- System prompt text or rule-file boilerplate
- Tool schemas, tool catalogs, or skill listings
- Runtime metadata such as current time, host, model, cwd

Be thorough. DO NOT USE ANY TOOLS. ONLY RESPOND WITH THE SUMMARY.
